headline: Axon (AXON) Wants to Give Every 911 Call an AI Co-Pilot
summary: Axon Enterprise, Inc. (NASDAQ:AXON) is one of the best falling stocks to invest in now. On April 7, Axon Enterprise, Inc. (NASDAQ:AXON) unveiled three new AI-powered tools during its annual Axon Week 2026 user conference. The tools are Axon Vision, an expanded Axon Assistant, and Axon 911.
